name: Baked Tuna Stuffed Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash potatoes and rub skins all over with oleo.
2. Prick each potato with a fork.
3. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
4. Place potatoes on an oven rack and bake for 1½ hours or until tender.
5. In a bowl, combine tuna, onion, parsley, cheese soup, paprika, Tabasco sauce, and salt.
6. Use a fork to break up the tuna and blend well.
7. Remove about 1-inch slice from the top of each potato.
8. Scoop out the inside of the potatoes, leaving the shells intact.
9. Add the potatoes to the tuna mixture, tossing to mix well.
10. Spoon the mixture into the potato shells, mounding high.
11. Top each with half a slice of cheese.
12. Return to the oven until the cheese melts. Serves 8.
